identity.name: @epdoc/table
identity.purpose: Terminal table formatter with ANSI-aware padding, column auto-sizing, zebra striping, and per-cell styling for CLI applications

quickStart.pattern: Create columns with buildColumns() or fluent API, then render with TableRenderer

exports.name: TableRenderer
exports.description: Main table rendering class with constructor and fluent APIs

exports.name: buildColumns
exports.description: Build column definitions from a declarative registry
exports.whenToUse: When defining columns separately from the renderer

exports.name: formatters
exports.whenToUse: When formatting numeric values in tables

exports.name: ColorType / StyleFn / ColorSpec
exports.whenToUse: When applying custom styling to cells or headers

patterns.name: Declarative Columns
Fluent API
patterns.when: Building tables incrementally with method chaining

patterns.name: Zebra Striping
patterns.when: Creating alternating row backgrounds for readability

patterns.name: Full Borders
